name: Knowbility
description: Knowbility — Accessibility / A11y Testing tool for developers

seo.title: Knowbility — Accessibility / A11y Testing
seo.meta_description: Knowbility: Knowbility — Accessibility / A11y Testing tool for developers

when_to_use: Accessibility training workshops for development team
AIR program pairing org with real disabled user testers
WCAG expert review commissioned for critical product launch
Accessibility roadmap built with Knowbility consulting engagement
Developer education on Section 508 compliance requirements

pros: Nonprofit with deep accessibility training expertise
AIR audits and training are industry-respected
Focus on inclusive design, not just compliance
cons: Not a SaaS product despite category listing
No automated scanning or monitoring dashboards
review.verdict: Respected accessibility nonprofit offering audits and training, not a tool you buy and deploy.
review.best_for: Organizations seeking expert-led a11y audits and team training.
review.not_for: Engineering teams looking for a scanner or CI integration.
